name: Arlington

population.sourceName: US Decennial Census 2020, via Wikipedia list of MA municipalities

majorFacilities.name: Mount Auburn Hospital / Beth Israel Lahey Health, 22 Mill Street

healthcareLandscape.dominantFacilityType: outpatient medical offices and primary care; no hospital in town
healthcareLandscape._context: Market context only. These facilities are NOT clients of Dory’s Cleaning Services and no copy may imply they are.
healthcareLandscape.note: Arlington has NO hospital. Symmes Hospital closed in 1999, was demolished in 2008 and the site is now housing — never reference it as operating. Nearest hospitals are Mount Auburn in Cambridge and Winchester Hospital in Winchester.

_howToFill: Every non-null value needs a source you actually read. majorFacilities is MARKET CONTEXT, never a client list — copy must say "serving practices in and around the {facility} corridor". Leave null rather than guess.
